llm_keywords.keyword: exponential decrease of |I| near zero voltage
llm_keywords.evidence: At V = -0.1, |I| = 8.897350992969297e-103 A; at V = -0.05, |I| is even smaller, showing a rapid decrease in |I| as V approaches zero.
At V = -0.1, |I| = 8.897350992969297e-103 A; at V = 0.1, |I| = 6.899103373692976e-103 A, indicating similar magnitudes for positive and negative voltages near zero.

llm_keywords.keyword: linear decrease of ln(|I|/V^2) with increasing 1/|V|
llm_keywords.evidence: ln(|I|/V^2) decreases from about -14.22 at 1/|V|=0.1667 to about -230.38 at 1/|V|=10.
Maximum |I| ~ 2.4e-5 A at V=-6; minimum |I| ~ 8.9e-103 A near V=-0.1.
